briefdescription.para: Complete pending write process (needed at FF_FS_READONLY == 0)
Get sector size (needed at FF_MAX_SS != FF_MIN_SS)
Get erase block size (needed at FF_USE_MKFS == 1)
Inform device that the data on the block of sectors is no longer used (needed at FF_USE_TRIM == 1)
Create physical format on the media.
Read data form SD iSDIO register.
Write data to SD iSDIO register.
Masked write data to SD iSDIO register.

detaileddescription.para: In case of SD, it initializes the host controller and the card. This function also selects additional settings such as bus width, speed and block size.

simplesect.para: s - which contains an OR of the following information STA_NODISK Disk is not present STA_NOINIT Drive not initialized STA_PROTECT Drive is write protected 0 or only STA_PROTECT both indicate successful initialization.

briefdescription.para: Gets the status of the disk.

detaileddescription.para: In case of SD, it checks whether card is present or not.

simplesect.para: 0 Status ok STA_NOINIT Drive not initialized STA_NODISK No medium in the drive STA_PROTECT Write protected
In case Card detect signal is not connected, this function will not be able to check if card is present.

memberdef.argsstring: (BYTE pdrv, BYTE *buff, LBA_t sector, UINT count)
memberdef.name: disk_read

briefdescription.para: Reads the drive In case of SD, it reads the SD card using ADMA2 in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to the data buffer to store read data

simplesect.para: RES_OK Read successful STA_NOINIT Drive not initialized RES_ERROR Read not successful

memberdef.argsstring: (BYTE pdrv, const BYTE *buff, LBA_t sector, UINT count)
memberdef.name: disk_write

briefdescription.para: Reads the drive In case of SD, it reads the SD card using ADMA2 in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to the data to be written

simplesect.para: RES_OK Read successful STA_NOINIT Drive not initialized RES_ERROR Read not successful

briefdescription.para: List specific features and do miscellaneous functions on device.

detaileddescription.para: In case of SD, it control device specific features and miscellaneous functions other than generic read/write.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to the parameter depends on the command code.

simplesect.para: RES_OK Command successful RES_PARERR Command is invalid RES_NOTRDY Drive not initialized RES_ERROR Error occurred
